mapper.insert: insert into kh_system_message (title, is_valid, show_type, mess_body, expire_time) values (#{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isValid,jdbcType=BOOLEAN}, #{showType,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{messBody,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{expireTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.select:
select id, title, is_valid, show_type, mess_body, expire_time, create_time, update_time from kh_system_message
AND is_valid = true
AND (expire_time is null or expire_time > #{expireTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.update:
update kh_system_message set
title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
is_valid = #{isValid,jdbcType=BOOLEAN},
mess_body = #{messBody,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
expire_time = #{expireTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = now() where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
